videos.headline: Tennessee knocks off Alabama after Will Brooks picks off Jalen Milroe
videos.description: Jalen Milroe sees his pass intercepted by Will Brooks to ice the win for Tennessee.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee knocks off Alabama after Will Brooks picks off Jalen Milroe) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama lose again in thriller vs. Tennessee
videos.description: Tennessee outlast Alabama after a huge second half to give the Crimson Tide their second loss of the season.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Alabama lose again in thriller vs. Tennessee) 2024/10/19 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Alabama thwarts Tennessee's opening drive with a fumble
videos.description: Alabama gets the turnover as Malachi Moore knocks it loose from Dylan Sampson for a fumble.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama thwarts Tennessee's opening drive with a fumble) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Williams takes massive hit on first-down catch
videos.description: Ryan Williams picks up the first down and takes a huge hit to the back.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Williams takes massive hit on first-down catch) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jermod McCoy makes one-handed grab to pick off Milroe in end zone
videos.description: Tennessee's Jermod McCoy snags the interception with one hand to end Alabama's drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jermod McCoy makes one-handed grab to pick off Milroe in end zone) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Williams makes juggling catch in end zone for TD
videos.description: Alabama gets on the board as Jalen Milroe floats one to Ryan Williams for a 5-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Williams makes juggling catch in end zone for TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nico Iamaleava injured after his helmet slams to the ground
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava is shaken up after he is tackled and he slams his head to the grass.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nico Iamaleava injured after his helmet slams to the ground) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee's backup QB throws pick on first pass attempt
videos.description: Tennessee backup quarterback Gaston Moore throws a deep pass on his first attempt and is picked off by Malachi Moore.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee's backup QB throws pick on first pass attempt) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nico Iamaleava is hit as he's thrown leading to an INT
videos.description: Alabama's Jaylen Mbakwe gets the interception as Nico Iamaleava's arm is hit while throwing.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nico Iamaleava is hit as he's thrown leading to an INT) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Two Alabama receivers practice their jumpers on QB sneak
videos.description: While Jalen Milroe is running a QB sneak, two Alabama receivers pretend to shoot jump shots.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Two Alabama receivers practice their jumpers on QB sneak) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Sampson pulls Tennessee even with a TD
videos.description: Dylan Sampson scores the 2-yard touchdown to even the score at 7 in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Sampson pulls Tennessee even with a TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee's huge pass to Dont'e Thornton Jr. sets up a TD for the lead
videos.description: Tennessee's Dont'e Thornton Jr. gets Tennessee to the 3-yard line with a 55-yard play. Dylan Sampson scores his second TD of the game on the next play.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee's huge pass to Dont'e Thornton Jr. sets up a TD for the lead) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Justice Haynes restores Alabama's lead with easy TD
